{{Quote|I could really use your skills for a raid we're planning. If you don't join, I declare war. And you'll be the ones to deliver the news to old Ompiach.|Safonne Pendon, to Denuab and Dorin Venithon|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Ompiach''' was an infamous [[Nalroni/Legends|Nalroni]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and the leader of the [[Hy'thor Group|Hy'thor pirate group]]<ref name="AIR" /> by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]].<ref name="OmDate">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> Operating solely in the<ref name="AIR" /> [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> [[Mieru'kar sector/Legends|Mieru'kar sector]], Ompiach created a leadership council to manage certain affairs in his rigidly hierarchical organization, designing it so that the council would submit to his laws. Even so, many council members were also manipulated by the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Venithon Twins]], [[Denuab Venithon|Denuab]] and [[Dorin Venithon|Dorin]], both of whom held considerable sway in the group—and also harbored resentment toward their leader due to his threats and stinginess. When Ompiach sent them to negotiate a treaty with his main rival, the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Safonne Pendon]], the [[Twin/Legends|Twins]] were tempted to abandon the Hy'thor pirate group when Pendon offered them more than what Ompiach was paying them. Furthermore, the Rodian threatened a war with Ompiach if they refused to join him.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Ompiach was mentioned in the [[1995]] book ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', which serves as a supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. Even though the events of ''Alliance Intelligence Reports'' are set<ref name="AIR" /> in 2 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]],<ref name="OmDate" /> which falls in the [[Rebellion era]],<ref name="LC">{{Blog|holocron|24|Star Wars Eras}}</ref> the book also states that Ompiach can be used as a character in [[roleplaying game]]s set during the [[New Republic era]].<ref name="AIR" />
